mutation_preconditions: implementation_brief validates against the CodeBrigade contract
implementation_plan lists target files, test files, caller candidates, contract surfaces, dependency edges, and refusal conditions
investigation playbook read stages are acknowledged before source mutation
execution preflight passes before source mutation
repository survey evidence exists for candidate files before source mutation
guarded natural-language inference requires explicit backtick-delimited path and edit literals
test-inferred execution requires a single source candidate, test import, and simple literal expectation
verification strategy names focused checks before source mutation
dirty worktree or unknown ownership requires explicit blocker instead of overwrite
forbidden_execution_shortcuts: mutating source without repository survey evidence
editing tests to match a broken implementation
claiming readiness when verification is only planned
